title: Operators & Expressions
source_outline: Arithmetic operators: +, -, *, true division (/) vs floor division (//), modulo (%), exponentiation (**)
Operator precedence: precedence order; using parentheses to control evaluation
Logical operators: and, or, not; short-circuit evaluation
Boolean values and truthiness: True/False; truthy and falsy values

artifact_plan.diagram_intent: Operator-precedence ladder as a vertical layered diagram: highest→lowest tiers — parentheses () → ** → unary minus → * / // % → + - → comparisons → not → and → or. Layered TB, top = binds first.
artifact_plan.diagram_note: Added at HITL#4 to honor the deep-profile diagram default (precedence is genuinely visual as an ordered ladder).

next_assessment.title: Python Core Skills Checkpoint
next_assessment.outcome: The learner can translate a plain-English problem into correct, tested Python using variables, control flow, and functions.
